name: Irma
ability: On your 1st night, choose X (more than 1). All players know X. X-1 good players start knowing 1 evil player, 1 of which is the Demon. On day X, evil wins. [+1 Minion]
firstNightReminder: The Irma chooses a number (more than 1). :reminder: Put the Irma to sleep. Announce X. Wake X-1 players 1 at a time & point to an evil player (1 player pointed to is the Demon). X-1:reminder:s
otherNightReminder: Change the Irma reminder token to the relevant day. :reminder:
